nasb.text: “He has blinded their eyes and He hardened their heart, so that they would not see with their eyes and perceive with their heart, and be converted and I heal them.”

esv.text: “He has blinded their eyes and hardened their heart, lest they see with their eyes, and understand with their heart, and turn, and I would heal them.”

cnv.text: “　神使他們瞎了眼，硬了心， 免得他們眼睛看見， 心裡明白而回轉過來； 我就醫好他們。”

ccb.text: “主使他们眼瞎、心硬， 免得他们眼睛看见， 心里明白，回心转意， 就得到我的医治。”

csbs.text: “神使他们瞎了眼， 硬了心， 免得他们眼睛看见， 心里明白， 回转过来， 我就使他们痊愈。”
